before.source: Vantor Open Data pre-event reference scene, not Copernicus EMS official before imagery
before.coverage: Covers the official AOI02 EMS features and is now published as WebP tiles. Northern AOI edge may contain transparent/black pixels where the Vantor scene does not cover the full AOI bounds.
before.staticHosting: GitHub raw fallback for production until AOI02 before tiles are bulk-synced to R2. Tiles are committed in the repository under public/data/tiles/emsr884-aoi02-caracas/before/.

imagery.note: After imagery is official Copernicus EMS post-event COG/tiles. Before imagery is a Vantor Open Data pre-event reference scene, not official EMS before imagery. AOI02 before tiles are currently hosted through GitHub raw as a production fallback until R2 bulk sync is completed; results remain uncertain where post-event chips are dark/hazy or shadows affect the target.

sourceScenes.use: candidate gap-fill only; intersects the far west edge of AOI12 but has 30% cloud cover and should not replace cleaner LG scenes

imagery.note: After imagery is official Copernicus EMS post-event COG/tiles. Before imagery is Vantor Open Data pre-event reference mosaic, not official EMS before imagery, and may have partial coverage/gaps. A WV03 2026-05-31 candidate was found for possible west-edge gap fill but is not yet promoted into the published before tiles due to cloud/quality risk.
